title: Smoky Middle Eastern Lamb Skewers
description: Grilled lamb skewers with a smoky flavor, inspired by Middle Eastern cuisine. Serve with a side of couscous or pita bread.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together smoky eastern seasoning blend, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush skewers with olive oil and season with additional smoky eastern seasoning blend if desired.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
7. Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
